runtime_dependencies.name: Node.js
runtime_dependencies.purpose: Runtime environment for executing JavaScript server-side.

runtime_dependencies.name: Express
runtime_dependencies.purpose: HTTP server framework for building the REST API.

runtime_dependencies.name: better-sqlite3
runtime_dependencies.purpose: SQLite library for managing the storage of tasks.

environment_variables.name: PORT
environment_variables.purpose: Port on which the Express server listens for HTTP requests.

container_recommendation.notes: Using alpine version for a lightweight container; no multi-stage needed as build is simple.

filesystem_requirements.notes: Directory for storing SQLite database file.

assumption_flags: Assuming SQLite does not need additional extensions or libraries other than better-sqlite3.
Assuming local development requires no special network configurations.
env_report.summary: The environment targets a Docker container hosting a Node.js application with Express for HTTP handling and SQLite for storage. Key dependencies include Node.js 18+ and Express 4.x, with moderate complexity. The primary setup risk involves ensuring containerized SQLite database performance meets expectations for larger datasets.
